seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Pattaya 2026 — Budget to Luxury
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Pattaya for every budget. From beachfront hostels to luxury resorts at Hilton and Centara. Real prices, areas, and honest reviews.

intro: Pattaya's hotel scene covers every budget — from sub-$15 guesthouses in South Pattaya to five-star beachfront towers in North Pattaya and Wongamat. Location matters: Central Pattaya puts you in the middle of the action, Jomtien is quieter and better value, Naklua/Wongamat offers upscale calm, and Pratumnak Hill splits the difference. Here are 12 hotels we recommend across all budgets and areas.

hotels.name: Lub d Pattaya
hotels.description: Part of Thailand's best hostel chain, Lub d offers modern pod-style dorms and private rooms with clean design, fast wifi, and a social atmosphere. Common areas include a pool, coworking space, and bar. Walking distance to Terminal 21 mall and the beach.
highlights: Swimming pool and social bar area
Pod beds with privacy curtains and USB charging
Walking distance to Terminal 21 Pattaya

hotels.name: Sawasdee Siam Pattaya
hotels.description: A well-maintained budget hotel in central South Pattaya, minutes from Walking Street and Beach Road. Clean air-conditioned rooms with hot water, fridge, and TV. The rooftop pool is a bonus at this price point. Popular with repeat visitors who know the value.
highlights: Rooftop swimming pool
5-minute walk to Walking Street
Clean rooms with air-con and hot water

hotels.name: Areca Lodge
hotels.description: A solid mid-budget hotel on Second Road in central Pattaya with two pools, a restaurant, and well-maintained rooms. The central location means you're walking distance to Beach Road, Central Festival mall, and nightlife. Rooms are simple but spacious and consistently clean.
highlights: Two swimming pools
Central location on Second Road
Restaurant and bar on-site

hotels.name: D Varee Jomtien Beach
hotels.description: A modern hotel directly across the road from Jomtien Beach with an infinity pool, gym, and multiple dining options. Rooms are contemporary with sea-view balconies available. The Jomtien location offers a more relaxed atmosphere compared to central Pattaya, with excellent beachfront restaurants nearby.
highlights: Infinity pool with Jomtien Beach views
Direct access to Jomtien Beach across the road
Modern rooms with sea-view balconies

hotels.name: Amari Pattaya
hotels.description: Set on a private headland at the quiet northern end of Pattaya Beach, Amari occupies a prime location with direct beach access and two pools surrounded by tropical gardens. The resort feel is a world away from the Central Pattaya chaos, yet it's only a short songthaew ride to the action.
highlights: Private headland location with direct beach access
Two pools in tropical garden setting
Multiple restaurants including Italian and Thai

hotels.name: Avani Pattaya Resort
hotels.description: A well-positioned mid-range resort on Pattaya Beach Road with a large freeform pool, spa, and contemporary rooms. The beachfront location puts you in the center of the action with direct beach access. Part of the Minor Hotels group, ensuring consistent quality.
highlights: Beachfront on Pattaya Beach Road
Large freeform swimming pool
Full spa and fitness center

hotels.name: Somerset Pattaya
hotels.description: Serviced apartments ideal for longer stays, with full kitchens, washing machines, and spacious living areas. Located on Second Road in the heart of Central Pattaya with a pool, gym, and minimart. Excellent value for families or digital nomads needing a home base.
highlights: Full kitchen and washing machine in every unit
Swimming pool and gym
Central location near Terminal 21

hotels.name: Centara Grand Mirage Beach Resort
hotels.description: A spectacular Lost World-themed resort on Wongamat Beach with a massive water park-style pool complex, lazy river, water slides, and a private beach. The resort is a destination in itself with multiple restaurants, spa, and kids' club. One of Thailand's most popular family luxury resorts.
highlights: Lost World themed pool complex with water slides and lazy river
Private section of Wongamat Beach
Kids' Club and family-focused activities

hotels.name: Hilton Pattaya
hotels.description: A sleek high-rise hotel sitting atop the CentralFestival Pattaya Beach mall with a rooftop infinity pool offering 180-degree views of Pattaya Bay. Rooms on upper floors have panoramic sea views. The location combines luxury convenience with direct access to shopping, dining, and the beach.
highlights: Rooftop infinity pool with panoramic bay views
Sitting atop CentralFestival mall — shopping and dining at your doorstep
Horizon rooftop bar for sunset cocktails

hotels.name: Dusit Thani Pattaya
hotels.description: A grand Thai-heritage luxury resort on the quiet northern end of Pattaya Beach with extensive gardens, multiple pools, and direct beach access. The property has a classic five-star elegance with attentive Thai hospitality. Several dining options including the acclaimed Italian restaurant.
highlights: Extensive tropical gardens on the beachfront
Multiple swimming pools and full spa
Quieter northern beach location away from the crowds

hotels.name: Royal Cliff Grand Hotel
hotels.description: A sprawling cliff-side resort complex with private beach access, 11 dining venues, five pools, and panoramic views from the Pratumnak Hill headland. The Royal Cliff has hosted heads of state and international conferences — it's old-school luxury with extensive grounds and facilities you won't find elsewhere in Pattaya.
highlights: Private beach accessible by hotel shuttle
11 restaurants and 5 swimming pools
Cliff-top location with panoramic bay views

hotels.name: Mytt Beach Hotel
hotels.description: A boutique-style hotel on North Pattaya Beach with a sleek rooftop pool and bar, modern minimalist rooms, and direct beach access. The property has a contemporary design sensibility that stands out from the older resorts. Popular with younger couples and design-conscious travelers.
highlights: Rooftop pool and sky bar
Modern boutique design
Direct North Pattaya Beach access
